metadata.description: AI agent plugins — trading, media generation, browser automation, price analysis

plugins.name: trader
plugins.description: Solana trading agent — open/close leveraged perpetual positions and spot swap SOL/USDC via Jupiter

plugins.name: price
plugins.description: Solana price analysis — real-time Pyth prices, RSI/MACD/Bollinger signals, pivot-point levels, Fear & Greed sentiment, CoinGecko history

plugins.name: elevenlabs
plugins.description: ElevenLabs speech — batch transcribe audio files (STT), convert text to audio (TTS), and speak text aloud

plugins.name: replicate
plugins.description: Replicate AI media — generate images (seedream, banana) and create videos from images (wan-video)

plugins.name: browser
plugins.description: Browser automation via playwright-cli — navigate, click, fill forms, take screenshots, manage sessions on any website
